feedback.text: Hello, I think this initiative should also take into account the key ideas from the Stop Killing Games ECI. I have a lot of great memories with older games, especially multiplayer ones, and it would mean a lot to be able to self-host them to enjoy again with friends or family. Right now, studios can just shut down access without offering any alternatives. They shouldnt be forced to support games forever, but there should be a fair retirement plan that lets players keep enjoying what they paid for. Thanks!
